Property Overview

Life on Indian Lake

Nestled along the quiet shores of Indian Lake in Dowagiac, Michigan, this lakehouse offers the rare combination of genuine privacy and easy access to one of southwest Michigan's most beloved inland lakes. Whether you're watching morning mist rise off the water from the comfort of the living room, or gathering around the fireplace after a day on the lake — this is the place where memories are made. Recently renovated throughout, the home is move-in ready with nothing left to do but enjoy it.

With three or more bedrooms and a fully equipped kitchen, there's room for the whole family and then some. Indian Lake is a premier destination for fishing, kayaking, and boating — and this address puts you right on it. Step outside to a massive deck perfect for entertaining, or unwind in the beautiful sunroom — your own private retreat no matter the season.

3 Bedrooms

About Indian Lake

Michigan's Hidden Gem

Indian Lake is one of southwest Michigan's most beloved inland lakes — known for clean water, excellent fishing, and a welcoming community of year-round and seasonal residents. Dowagiac puts you within easy reach of Lake Michigan, wineries, and the great outdoors.

527
Acres
Spacious lake with room for boating, kayaking, and fishing
Bass
Prime Fishing
Largemouth bass, bluegill, crappie, and pike year-round
2h
From Chicago
Easy weekend escape from Chicago, South Bend, and Detroit
4
Seasons
Swimming and boating in summer, ice fishing and snowmobiling in winter
